title: lithospermum kelloggianum
intro: Lithospermum kelloggianum, also known as Kellogg's gromwell or Kellogg's larkspur, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Lithospermum kelloggianum has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to utilize its medicinal properties.
